content.en:
The headquarters of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, the Hall of the Elders.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came here, carrying only the Mythical Golden Grass, and as for the other treasure resources, they were all brought into the human realm.

It's not that he doesn't worry about the first elder, but it is still necessary to be cautious.

When the first patriarch learned that Ye Tian was back, he immediately appeared.

"Elder Ye Tian, have you found the Mythical Golden Grass?" the First Elder asked in an extremely expectant tone.

"Fortunately, I found one, but I also paid a lot of doppelgangers!" Ye Tian said.

There was nothing false in what he said, he did lose a lot of replica bodies.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out the mythical golden grass.

When the first patriarch saw it, he was immediately excited.

"Mythical Golden Grass indeed!"

The first patriarch didn't immediately take this Mythical Golden Grass, but after some thanks, he took the Mythical Golden Grass and also took out a good thing.

"Elder Ye Tian, this is the Eternal Essence of the Essence, just a drop can elevate your cultivation to the peak realm of the Mythical Dao Realm!"

The First Elder said.

"Eternal Essence Marrow, a drop can raise cultivation to the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This is indeed a good thing, and it can save him countless years of penance.

The First Patriarch is worthy of being the most powerful Patriarch of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and he is also the oldest Patriarch, and there are many good things!

"First Elder, then I'm welcome!"

Ye Tian received the Eternal Yuan Marrow.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Hall of the Elders and returned to the Human Domain.

And the First Patriarch also announced the retreat.

......

Human domain.

Ye Tian took out this drop of Eternal Yuan Marrow, first identified it with the Eye of Identification, and after confirming that it was correct, he swallowed it and refined it to improve his cultivation.

Other than that.

Ye Tian was also using the Eye of Identification to identify other resources found from the Mythical Valley.

Such as those mythical spirits, etc.

For example, the crimson vine, he directly identified.

Mythical Xuanteng, after cultivating to reach the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm, after the Mythical Body reaches the ninth transformation, it will be directly ground into powder and refined, which can assist the body to become eternal to the Dao

Eternal to Taoist?

What is it?

Ye Tian didn't know, but it was definitely something that the First Patriarch and the First Demon Venerable had to do, which was the so-called semi-breakthrough!

Subsequently.

He took out a second mythical artifact and continued to be firm.

Mythical unicorn flower, which can be used to improve the transformation of the mythical body, and can also be used to improve cultivation

In addition to these mythical spiritual objects, he also identified those innate primordial treasures one by one, and there were many good things among them.

Especially one of the innate original treasures, which Ye Tian particularly valued.

[The Innate Primordial Treasure Bloodstone can allow the Mythical Dao Realm and those who have cultivated to be lower to merge into a drop of blood and drop into it, and after falling, the Innate Primordial Treasure Bloodstone can resurrect it. This ability is passive and does not require research.

"Good thing, this bloodstone is too important!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Soon, he called his son Ye Xingchen to him and took out the bloodstone: "Xingchen, this innate primordial treasure is for you, it is called bloodstone." You fuse a drop of your own essence blood into it and place it in the Terran Temple, where you can be resurrected with the power of Bloodstone once you fall outside. "

"The Innate Primordial Treasure that Can Help Resurrect !!!"

Ye Xingchen was shocked.

"Father, you might as well use it yourself!" Ye Xingchen said.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "Your father and I have multiple clones, who can kill me?"

Seeing this, Ye Xingchen also accepted it.

Immediately.

Ye Tian gave Ye Xingchen a few petals of the Mythical Qilin Flower: "This is the petal of the Mythical Qilin Flower of the Mythical Spirit Object, which can help you improve your cultivation and improve the body of the myth." "

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen said happily.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen took the petals of the mythical unicorn flower and went to retreat and cultivate.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian also distributed the petals of the Mythical Qilin Flower to his wife and daughter, which was enough to raise their cultivation to the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm, and they could also complete the transformation of their Mythical Bodies again and again.

The years that followed.

Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Xiao Yue, their cultivation continued to skyrocket, the body of mythology completed its transformation again and again, and its strength was rapidly improving.

And Ye Tian also successfully raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the Mythical Dao Realm with the help of the Eternal Yuan Marrow.

Moreover, with the help of the remaining Mythical Qilin Flower and other resources, he completed the sixth transformation of his supreme mythical body.

At this time, his strength skyrocketed again, and he was able to find more good things in the Valley of Mythology, as well as kill more Mythical Spirits.

Gradually, Ye Tian got more and more good things.

Other than that.

With the help of the Eternal Rule Disk, Ye Tian fused a large number of first-order Supreme Dao Rule items brought out into low-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

With these Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, he can quickly improve his Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

As the years passed, another long time passed.

Ye Tian's Eternal Sequence Dao Rules gradually rose to the One Cheng Realm, and then the Twenty Cheng Realm.

"The next time the Mythical Valley comes out will be after the eighteen million epochs, once it comes out next time, my strength will be transformed again!" Ye Tian muttered.

Meanwhile.

He was also paying attention to the situation of the First Elder and the First Demon Venerable.

He has a deduction-type innate original treasure - Wanyan Pan, which can deduce the general situation of the First Demon Venerable, if the First Demon Venerable is out of the customs, he will know it as soon as possible.

this day.

The First Demon Venerable was out of the level, and he was still coming towards the Innate Origin Domain at an extremely fast speed.

"It seems that the First Demon Venerable has broken through in half a step, I wonder if the First Elder has broken through?"

Ye Tian passed the news to the first elder.

If the First Elder can't stop it, he must take action to block the First Demon Venerable.

With his current strength, he feels that he should not be weaker than the first elder, but who is really strong and who is weak, he has to fight to know.

But he shot with multiple replica bodies, even in the face of the First Demon Venerable, he was not afraid.

But there is no need for him to reveal his strength now, unless it is a last resort.

......

Hall of the Senate.

The First Elder received the news of the First Demon Venerable, and also deduced it to confirm that the First Demon Venerable had indeed come.

"Eternal Dao has improved a bit, even if he is not the opponent of the First Demon Venerable, but he can't kill me if he wants to. "

The First Elder muttered.

Somewhere in the void.

The First Demon Venerable was constantly shuttling, and suddenly the First Elder appeared and intercepted him.

"Mogu, what are you doing here?"

The First Elder asked.
